lines.text: keep poppin' off at the market,
get your fuckin' whispers turn off
all the features if you didn't
smell the smell of your bump
at the moment of closing the
shutters it didn't work out,
what did you dream of?
that day, that night, she also wants to eat the shadow
she doesn't give a fuck about the land or the alleys
she chose the smell of the cold alleys herself
but don't be afraid of the novelties
somewhere in the distance,
the gatherers of the bones
while on stage,
the label sounds like
the city of Johnny Cage
the sketch glitters
in the dark a little
bit of tea,
the rest is in
the oven
i don't know what to cut
i know the boss from the shoulder
it's better to kill than to lie
the stupid drug dealer didn't get the idea
the candles are out
the kitchens have stopped burning
but everything is still here somewhere,
the recording from the booth is flying
don't cry, my little one
under the fire of the beard
caps around the panic
we need to put up a monument
one more round
they often say that hip -hop is their hobby
they want to be blacker than black coffee
ready to refute it again and say that their love is somewhere
far in the ass
all for the sake of profit
you are where there are a lot of drugs
fountains on the roll with that guy, wait,
you will not remain so in my memory
bam bam bam honestly, you will entertain
me push me on the brain
i'd better go buy a balloon and draw graffiti on the walls
my boots don't wear magazines
suck us up with a lot of dark power
we are moving at night as if we are strong enough to
rise
no, not on a kilogram
on a level
higher on a mile
where i don't go out on the street like Mila K
hip -hop in love
